transcript.text:
[What is this...?]
[Has anyone eaten a lunch box like this?]
[Huh?]
[Stir-fried kimchi]
[Fried egg]
[Spam]
[Bulgogi (soy sauce marinated beef)]
[There hasn't been a lunch box like this]
That was so tiring I'm exhausted
You have to mix everything like the traditional ways
[But I get it stir-fried]
[No need to worry about leftovers]
[Starts now~!]
[A clear day on Ulleung Island]
What's today's menu?
1 serving of lunch box

Will that be enough for you?
It's 1-serving if I'm eating by myself
I have everything prepped here
I'm going to make a lunch box
Let's get the rice going first
[Just how much are you going to eat?!]
[All of it]
That'll work
Let's get the kimchi stir-fried
Cut in half
I'm going to cook the other half as a whole
How's that?
Let's cook the kimchi now
Get some oil going
[Bathe in oil]
The color of it is amazing

This kimchi looks so good
Stir-fried kimchi slices
Let's prepare the fried egg while that cooks
[Separating the yolk from the egg whites?]
The yolk
[I thought it was fried egg, not scrambled?]
[Egg whites in]
[What about the yolk?]
You can't forget about this when making fried eggs
[MSG (Monosodium Glutamate aka artificial seasoning salt)]
I'll cook the yolk here
[Cooking it separately]
[Making sure the kimchi is not getting burnt]
[I'm pissed!]
What do I do?
[Let me help]

[Looking like a pancake]
Thank you
It looks perfect
So is the kimchi
It's like braised kimchi
Kimchi will be today's highlight
That should be all for a regular lunch box
But with spam too! I can't miss out on the meat
I have some beef bulgogi too
[Preparing the vegetables]
Just half an onion because I don't like it much
[Artificial bulgogi sauce] Don't we all use this?
[Lots of magic sauce]
That's cold
Let's cook the spam while this sits
Now that's done

Let's take it out
That's cute
Beef bulgogi
[Just enjoy that sound]
[Sesame oil]
Let's put the rice
It'll turn into scorched rice
[Fill half with white rice]
[Get the kimchi as a whole]
[With stir-fried kimchi on the side]
Bulgogi too
[Purchased side dishes]
[Giant Vienna sausages]
[With spam too]
[Octopus sausage in the middle]
[Top it off with some dried seaweed]

[Coered with fried egg]
[And also the yolk]
This lunch box took 5 hours to make
Whole kimchi & stir-fried kimchi
Beef bulgogi,
Stir-fried anchovies, soy sauce black beans,
This is the... Seasoned dried shredded squid
Giant Vienna sausages
Spam, fried egg, and rice
Can you see the lights in the back?
They're all squid boats
Pretty, right? The squid boats are floating around
Anyways, that was so tiring I'm starving
Bon appetit
I've been wanting to eat this spam
Get the spam on a spoonful of rice

This grill is keeping everything warm
And the rice is cooked really well It tastes so good
I was so hungry, really
[Eat up]
Stir-fried kimchi on top
I made it, but it's so good Even if I just stir-fried it
The longer you cook it,
The softer and tastier it gets
Even softer than braised kimchi
Some bulgogi with rice
That's really familiar
It's something everyone's tasted before
I guess everyone uses this magical sauce
But I think I had this at home too
Mom...?
You can't forget the anchovies in a lunch box

Stir-fried anchovies, soy sauce black beans,
Also the shredded squid
[3-combo side dish]
[Put the rice neatly]
Nevermind, let's just eat!
I'm hungry!
This tastes better than the ones that are sold
That's so cool!
They're like stars
I was very hungry It's so tasty
Giant fried egg
How do I go about eating this?
Like a pizza?
Let's try the yolk
Look at that thickness
It's egg yolk cake!

It's like a cheesecake
Like an egg roll or steamed egg
That's so big
I should give her a treat
Looks delicious It's like eating braised kimchi
Has anyone had a lunch box this big?
It's longer than my arm
It's not going away
It still looks new
It's really cold right now
It's like Winter now
It's Winter here(?)
This is the right weather to eat some hot steamed sweet potatoes
Egg whites It's so big
What's rice and what's egg?
This is actually not a sausage It's a hot bar (fish cake skewer)

I was surprised to see a hot bar this big
They're usually half this size
Some kimchi
I'm halfway there
[Let's speed things up now]
You know how you mix the lunch box like the old traditional way?
It'd be so good that way
I guess we'll have to stir-fry it instead
Let's eat the side dishes like black beans because they won't be good in fried rice
Bye octopus legs
[I'll make you into something better]
[That smells amazing]
This one's for you
It's Gom-soon's lucky day
The "traditional lunch box" looks is nowhere to be found now
It's just fried rice now, but it looks delicious

[Hurry and take a bite...]
The kimchi is way too good for the fried rice to not taste good
Thank you
What time is it right now?
7:45PM
I started preparing for today's mukbang at 8 in the morning
I had to go grocery shopping and get everything ready until like 11 o'clock
And now it's been 12 hours
Literally been 12 hours
I've never thought I'd wear a bomber jacket in the Fall
Wearing a Winter jacket in Fall
Fried rice
Incredible
You're amazing
The grill is really big
Even this much is a lot of food

[That doesn't look too good]
[Airborne]
[There's our accident of the day]
Am I dumb?
So dumb
The rice is all falling apart
It doesn't taste as good now
It's like I stir-fried this with scorched rice
It doesn't taste bad though
Just unique
[Can't let a single grain of rice go to waste]
Last bowl!
Let's set it down
[You won't give me some?]
Do you want some?
Nope!

Get in here Last scoop
Last one
1 last bite
[Finished]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
